seoTitle: Switch to Classic View in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: How to switch back to the classic layout for reports and bank feeds in QuickBooks Online where the toggle is still available.
intro: Adjusting to a major interface overhaul is disruptive, especially if you had workflows built around the old layout. While QuickBooks Online has retired global classic view for standard dashboards, specific screens like reports and bank feeds still offer a toggle back to the previous version. This guide shows you where to find it.

steps.heading: Explore the new interface first
steps.body: Take a moment to review the restructured left-hand navigation panel so you know what's changed.

steps.heading: Switch reports to classic view
steps.body: Go to Reports, open a specific document, then click the Switch to Classic View toggle in the upper header ribbon.

steps.heading: Save your preferred layout
steps.body: Once in classic view, adjust columns as needed and click Save Customization to lock in that format.

steps.heading: Switch bank feeds to classic view
steps.body: Go to All Apps, select Accounting, launch Bank Transactions, then click Switch to Previous Version in the upper toolbar.

steps.heading: Find hidden toggles if needed
steps.body: If a classic toggle isn't visible on a screen, use the top header search bar to jump directly into legacy menus, or submit feedback through the Gear icon.

faq.question: Is classic view available everywhere in QuickBooks Online?
faq.answer: No, Intuit has retired global classic configurations for most dashboards — the toggle is only preserved on specific screens like reports and bank feeds.

faq.question: Will classic report views be removed eventually?
faq.answer: Intuit has signaled a phased sunset for standard and custom classic report views, so expect this option to be temporary.

faq.question: What if I can't find the classic view toggle on a page?
faq.answer: Try the top header search bar to jump directly into legacy menus that may not have a visible toggle button.

faq.question: How do I request that Intuit keep certain classic features?
faq.answer: Click the Gear icon and use the Feedback portal panel to submit optimization requests directly to Intuit.
